Latsi Beach, Polis Cyprus

Welcome to The Villa Jolo

The Villa Jolo  located in the charming town of Latsi, near Polis in Cyprus. Nestled just 20 meters from the beach, the villa offers breathtaking first-line sea views.

  • 6 guests
  • 3 bedrooms
  • 3 bathrooms
  • 320 sqm

The Villa Jolo  located in the charming town of Latchi, near Polis in Cyprus. Nestled just 20 meters from the beach, the villa offers breathtaking first-line sea views.

Situated in a serene and picturesque area, it provides the perfect retreat for relaxation and tranquility.

This is the ideal place for you to escape the hustle and bustle of everyday life and immerse yourself in the beauty of nature.

About Us

Location

The villa is located in the charming town of Latsi, in the north west part of Cyprus.
